title: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Tanker Report - April 9, 2024
summary:
Main
Image reference: assets/2024-04-09_202449wet_img_tankerreporttop_ae4ed56d817a.png
· VLCC Market Slows Down Post-Chinese Holidays but Owners Remain Resilient Amid Softening Rates, Rising Oil Prices - The VLCC market has become rather inactive following the conclusion of the Chinese holidays. Recent spot fixture activity suggests a softening momentum in market prices across the Atlantic and Pacific regions, although owners remain optimistic about a potential resurgence in activity soon. Despite this, the first week of April saw relatively stable rate levels, with owners displaying resilience through off-market negotiations.
